widgets_values:
The final resolution will be：
base * 1.7(for 2nd gen) * 2.2 (for sd upscale）


最终图片大小为:
初始大小 x 1.7 (第二次生成前放大）x
2.2 (SD 放大倍数）

nodes.title: Empty Latent Image (Base Dimensions) 初始大小
Lora Usage / LoRa使用建议
widgets_values:
All Moody Models (ZIB/ZIT) recommends using ZIB Loras！
全线MOODY系列模型均推荐使用ZIB模型！

LoRas used on ZIB will have stronger effect on image structure whereas LoRas used on ZIT will be more toward the details.
在ZIB步骤使用的LoRa会影响构图和动作，在ZIT步骤的LoRa会影响更多细节。

当然，如果你想要超级相似的人物，你可以把ZIB的人物Lora同时放在第一和第二步里，
to achieve absolute likeliness, you can put your ZIB character lora in both ZIB and ZIT steps

# 📥 Download Links / 下载地址

- **Moody Wild Mix** (Z-image Base/Distilled variant，ZIB/ZID模型)

## 🧩 ZIB Model / Base 模型

  https://civitai.com/models/2384856/moody-wild-mix  

  ⚠️ **Warning!** Do not download the distilled model.  
  Please select the **undistilled 45–50 steps version**.

  ⚠️ **注意！** 不要下载蒸馏模型  
  请下载 **未蒸馏（45–50步）版本**

---

## ⚡ Z-Image-Turbo-SDA (Diversity Fix Adapter，多样性修复)

- **File:** `zit_sda_v1.safetensors`  
  https://huggingface.co/F16/z-image-turbo-sda/resolve/main/zit_sda_v1.safetensors

- **Description / 说明:**  
  Z-Image-Turbo-SDA is a highly efficient LoKr (Low-Rank Kronecker Product) adapter designed to rescue the **"Diversity Collapse"** problem in few-step distilled Flow Matching / Diffusion models.  
  用于解决少步数蒸馏 Flow Matching / Diffusion 模型中的“多样性崩塌”问题的高效 LoKr 适配器。

---

## 🔍 Upscaler Models / 放大模型

### 🔸 4xNomos8k (Recommended，强烈推荐)

  https://github.com/Phhofm/models/releases/download/4xNomos8k_atd_jpg/4xNomos8k_atd_jpg.safetensors

---

### 🔸 4x UltraSharp (Alternative upscale model/备选放大方案)
 If SD Upscale node is stuck or takes too long swap to 4x UltraSharp model instead, 如果SD放大步骤耗时过长，可以选择4x UltraSharp
- **Model:** `4xUltraSharp`  
  https://openmodeldb.info/models/4x-UltraSharp

---

### 🔸 1x SkinContrast (Skin Enhancement)
- **Model:** `1xSkinContrast-High-SuperUltraCompact`  
  https://openmodeldb.info/models/1x-SkinContrast-High-SuperUltraCompact

nodes.title: For special requests | 1 on 1 help contact me at
← Generation Tips 生图小贴士:
widgets_values:
You can run Preview Image node on the left to preview see the image before SD upscale. Change up the seed until you find the best generation.

Change Prompt/Lora/Seed, preview, no defects? run full workflow. 

In 1st Generation you should be looking at the
 - composition
 - major defects/pose anormalies (small defects will likely be fixed in 2nd generation)

In 2nd Generation, you should be looking at the fine details
 - fingers/toes
 - facial expression
 - text
 - any other small details




你可以运行左边的 Preview Image 节点，在进行 SD 放大之前先预览图像。随机新种子来抽卡。

修改 Prompt / Lora，进行预览，如果没有明显缺陷，再运行完整工作流。

在第一轮生成中，你应该重点关注：
- 构图
- 主要缺陷 / 姿势异常（小缺陷通常可以在第二轮生成中修复）


在第二轮生成中，你应该重点关注细节：
- 手指 / 脚趾
- 面部表情
- 文字
- 其他任何细小的细节

←

nodes.title: SD UPSCALE Custom Prompt 自定义提示词
widgets_values: 韩风冷色调网红美白滤镜，极致冷白皮，白嫩幼，overexposure，通体雪白。高清现实主义风格，细节丰富，动态光影，8K超清。

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 泛黄，模糊，低分辨率，低质量图像，诡异的外观，多餘手臂, 多餘腿部，丑陋，躁点，网格感，JPEG压缩条纹，水印，乱码，意义不明的字符，

nodes.title: Why new prompt? 为什么需要单独提示词？
widgets_values:
Please default this to false, and turn on when neccessary. 

Imagine a prompt like “a person with plump lips and detailed vagina.”
When the image is generated all at once, the model understands the full human anatomy and correctly places plump lips on the face and the detailed vagina between the legs in the proper location.
But if the image is split into smaller sections and each part is generated independently, a section that only contains part of the inner thigh, lower abdomen, or pelvic area might still try to apply “plump lips” or “detailed vagina” there. Since lips and vulva share strong visual similarities (soft, full, pinkish, folded/ridged appearance), the model can easily confuse and mix them up.


默认为关闭，需要时再启用。

想象一个提示词是“一个人有丰满的嘴唇和细致的小穴（阴部）”。
如果整张图一次性生成，模型能够理解整体人体结构，把丰满的嘴唇正确放在脸上，把细致的小穴放在两腿之间的正确位置，解剖学上合理。
但如果把图像分成多个小块分别生成，每一块只看到局部内容。比如某一块只包含大腿内侧、腹部下缘或臀部附近，模型仍然会尝试在这一小块里应用“丰满的嘴唇”或“细致的小穴”这些特征。因为嘴唇和阴部在视觉上都有柔软、饱满、粉嫩、带有褶边/唇形的相似性，模型很容易混淆它们的位置。

balanced body posture。背法棍包。 on the right side is the blurred bokeh background of the opposite street with 灯火通明的高档写字楼, cars and pedestrians, shallow depth of field, urban atmosphere, modern architecture, photorealistic, realistic details, 8k, cinematic composition --ar 3:4 --stylize 200 --v 6 ，镜头倾斜，表现出都市动感
